$schema_note: Deployment definition — environments, topology, CI/CD, configuration, backups, monitoring
strategy: Containerized modular monolith. Primary target: single VPS with Docker Compose behind nginx (cheap, campus-friendly). Alternate: PaaS (Railway/Render + Vercel for the SPA) with identical images.

services.nginx: Reverse proxy + TLS termination + serves the built SPA (static) + proxies /api and /live (WebSocket upgrade) to api
services.api: Node 20-alpine image running the Express app (PM2-free; Docker restart: unless-stopped + healthcheck)
services.postgres: postgres:16-alpine with named volume; not exposed publicly
services.redis (optional): Only added when scaling API horizontally (Socket.IO adapter + shared rate-limit store)

topology.networking: Internal Docker network; only nginx exposes 80/443; DB/API unreachable from outside
topology.domain_ssl: portal.<institution-domain> with Let's Encrypt via certbot (auto-renew); HTTP→HTTPS redirect; HSTS

development.setup: docker compose up postgres + pnpm dev (Vite HMR on :5173, API on :3000 with tsx watch)
development.data: prisma migrate dev + seed (demo term, sections, subjects, users per role, fake OSAS fixture server)
development.osas: Mock OSAS server (apps/api/test/mocks) so devs never hit the real university API

staging.purpose: UAT mirror of production; real OSAS sandbox credentials if available, otherwise mock
staging.data: Anonymized copy or full seed; wiped per release cycle
staging.gate: Department Admin sign-off on staging before production deploy

production.availability: Docker healthchecks + restart policies; /healthz probed by uptime monitor every 60s
production.capacity_baseline: 2 vCPU / 4GB RAM VPS comfortably serves ~2,000 students with concurrent class-hour scanning

main_pipeline: Deploy: ssh → docker compose pull → prisma migrate deploy → compose up -d → smoke test /healthz
Rollback: redeploy previous image tag (migrations are forward-compatible; destructive changes staged across two releases)
ci_cd.versioning: SemVer tags; CHANGELOG.md per release; images tagged with git SHA + version

configuration.principle: 12-factor — all config via environment variables; .env.example is the authoritative key list
configuration.secret_handling: Secrets in host secret store / CI encrypted secrets; never in images or repo; rotation procedure documented in maintenance runbook

backups_dr.database: pg_dump nightly (02:30) to encrypted archive; 30-day local retention; weekly copy to offsite/object storage
backups_dr.uploads: Object storage versioning enabled; weekly sync verification
backups_dr.restore: Documented one-command restore script; drill once per semester; RPO 24h, RTO 4h
backups_dr.disaster_recovery: Compose file + images + latest dump = full rebuild on any fresh VPS within RTO

monitoring_observability.logs: pino JSON → docker log driver → optional Loki/Grafana stack; request IDs correlate SPA errors to API logs
monitoring_observability.health: /healthz (liveness: db ping, osas reachability flag, uptime); uptime monitor alerts via email

scaling_path: Step 2: move Postgres to managed DB; add Redis; run 2+ api replicas behind nginx with Socket.IO Redis adapter
Step 3: CDN for SPA static assets; read replica for reports if needed
